### Energy & Environment Industry Today

# Europe Data Center Power Distribution Units and Power Supply Units Market to Reach $20,056.7 Million by 2035– BIS Research

The Europe Data Center Power Distribution Units and Power Supply Units market is undergoing a dramatic growth phase, underpinned by the accelerating digitization of industries, proliferation of hyperscale data centers, and stringent European Union regulations emphasizing energy efficiency. According to BIS Research, the market valued at $2,455.7 million in 2024 is forecast to reach $20,056.7 million by 2035, expanding at a CAGR of 21.23%. This surge is being powered by investments in next-generation PDUs and PSUs, with intelligent monitoring, modularity, and sustainability at the forefront of procurement decisions.

Published 12 August 2025

## What are Data Center Power Distribution Units and Power Supply Units?

Power Distribution Units (PDUs) ensure reliable and efficient electrical power distribution to critical IT equipment in data centers, with advanced models offering real-time monitoring and remote management.

Power Supply Units (PSUs) convert input power to safe voltages for hardware operation, supporting high-density workloads, redundancy, and energy efficiency crucial for modern, always-on data centers.
